mapper.select:
SELECT SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId,
'C' || TO_CHAR(SC.BUSINESS_DATE, 'YYYY') || LPAD(SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID, 4, '0') AS closingCode,
SC.BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, SC.CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, SC.CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, SC.STORE_ID AS storeId, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName
FROM STORE_CLOSINGS SC JOIN STORES S ON SC.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID
WHERE SC.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND SC.BUSINESS_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SC.BUSINESS_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY SC.BUSINESS_DATE DESC, SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID DESC

SELECT SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId,
'C' || TO_CHAR(SC.BUSINESS_DATE, 'YYYY') || LPAD(SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID, 4, '0') AS closingCode,
SC.BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, SC.CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, SC.CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, SC.STORE_ID AS storeId, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName
FROM STORE_CLOSINGS SC JOIN STORES S ON SC.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID
WHERE 1 = 1
AND SC.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND SC.BUSINESS_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SC.BUSINESS_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY SC.BUSINESS_DATE DESC, SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID DESC

SELECT SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId,
'C' || TO_CHAR(SC.BUSINESS_DATE, 'YYYY') || LPAD(SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID, 4, '0') AS closingCode,
SC.BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, SC.CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, SC.CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, SC.STORE_ID AS storeId, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName
FROM STORE_CLOSINGS SC JOIN STORES S ON SC.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID
WHERE SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID = #{closingId}

SELECT SCI.STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID AS storeClosingItemId,
SCI.SYSTEM_QUANTITY AS systemQuantity, SCI.PHYSICAL_QUANTITY AS physicalQuantity, SCI.DISPOSAL_QUANTITY AS disposalQuantity,
NVL(SCI.PHYSICAL_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(SCI.DISPOSAL_QUANTITY, 0) AS remainingQuantity,
NVL(SCI.SYSTEM_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(SCI.PHYSICAL_QUANTITY, 0) AS differenceQuantity,
SCI.CLOSING_ITEM_MEMO AS closingItemMemo, SCI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT AS materialNameSnapshot,
SCI.STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, SCI.STORE_INVENTORY_ID AS storeInventoryId,
M.MATERIAL_TYPE || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(M.MATERIAL_ID, 4, '0') AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType
FROM STORE_CLOSING_ITEMS SCI JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES SI ON SCI.STORE_INVENTORY_ID = SI.STORE_INVENTORY_ID JOIN MATERIALS M ON SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID
WHERE SCI.STORE_CLOSING_ID = #{closingId}
ORDER BY SCI.STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID

SELECT SI.STORE_INVENTORY_ID AS storeInventoryId, SI.CURRENT_QUANTITY AS currentQuantity, SI.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId,
M.MATERIAL_TYPE || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(M.MATERIAL_ID, 4, '0') AS materialCode, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.MATERIAL_TYPE AS materialType
FROM STORE_INVENTORIES SI JOIN MATERIALS M ON SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID
WHERE SI.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
ORDER BY M.MATERIAL_NAME
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE_CLS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE_CLOSINGS ( STORE_CLOSING_ID, BUSINESS_DATE, CLOSING_MEMO, CLOSED_AT, STORE_ID ) VALUES ( #{storeClosingId}, #{businessDate}, #{closingMemo}, SYSDATE, #{storeId} )

SELECT SEQ_STORE_CLS_ITEM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE_CLOSING_ITEMS ( STORE_CLOSING_ITEM_ID, SYSTEM_QUANTITY, PHYSICAL_QUANTITY, DISPOSAL_QUANTITY, CLOSING_ITEM_MEMO, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT, STORE_CLOSING_ID, STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) VALUES ( #{storeClosingItemId}, #{systemQuantity}, #{physicalQuantity}, #{disposalQuantity}, #{closingItemMemo}, #{materialNameSnapshot}, #{storeClosingId}, #{storeInventoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE STORE_INVENTORIES SET CURRENT_QUANTITY = #{quantity}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STORE_INVENTORY_ID = #{storeInventoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT SC.STORE_CLOSING_ID AS storeClosingId, SC.BUSINESS_DATE AS businessDate, SC.CLOSING_MEMO AS closingMemo, SC.CLOSED_AT AS closedAt, SC.STORE_ID AS storeId, S.STORE_NAME AS storeName FROM STORE_CLOSINGS SC JOIN STORES S ON SC.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE SC.STORE_ID = #{storeId} ORDER BY SC.BUSINESS_DATE DESC
